note: I-77 between Princeton (mm 9) and Charleston (mm 95) is the West Virginia Turnpike (toll). Commercial exits are limited; fuel/parking on the Turnpike is at the toll-road travel plazas (Bluestone, Beckley, Morton), listed as service_plaza. I-64 overlaps the Turnpike between Beckley and Charleston.
